name: Bjerg
description_en: Bjerg is an old man from the Freljord who has actually seen mythical beasts like Yeti and Balestriders but is however thought to be going senile. He is also Ingvar's uncle.
description_fr: Bjerg est un vieil homme de Freljord qui a vu des bêtes mythiques comme le Yéti et les Balestriders, mais qui est cependant considéré comme devenu sénile. Il est aussi l'oncle d'Ingvar.
